directions_tried.name: Phase 1: SZZ technique extraction + spectral gap + CNS threshold check
directions_tried.outcome: Best threshold β < 1/24 (CNS Sept 2025). Master loop worse (1/87). 48× gap to physical region.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Bakry-Émery Hessian slack analysis
directions_tried.outcome: H_norm ≤ 1/12 analytically (staggered mode at identity). If provable, gives β < 1/4 threshold.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Prove H_norm ≤ 1/12 + verify global maximum
directions_tried.outcome: E008: H_norm ≤ 1/12 proved at Q=I (Fourier). H_norm ≤ 1/8 proved for all Q. E009: λ_max = 4β at Q=I VERIFIED. Convention confirmed.

directions_tried.name: Phase 4: Numerical resolution of open conjecture
directions_tried.outcome: 100 diverse Q configs tested — zero counterexamples to H_norm ≤ 1/12. Q=I confirmed as unique global maximizer. Conjecture strongly supported.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Deep extraction of SZZ proof technique
explorations_completed.key_finding: K_S = N/2 - 8N(d-1)β; CNS doubled threshold to 1/24; SZZ+Chatterjee already in literature

explorations_completed.goal_summary: MCMC spectral gap proxy for SU(2) at β = 0.02–3.0
explorations_completed.key_finding: γ > 0 for all β; SZZ bound conservative by ~100×; smooth variation

explorations_completed.goal_summary: CNS master loop approach β₀(d) extraction
explorations_completed.key_finding: β₀(4) ≈ 1/87 < 1/24; master loop loses on β range; best threshold is 1/24

explorations_completed.goal_summary: SZZ Lemma 4.1 Hessian sharpness on 3D lattice
explorations_completed.key_finding: MAJOR: Lemma 4.1 bound 12-45× loose on typical Gibbs configs (3D)

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Hessian sharpness on 4D lattice + adversarial search
explorations_completed.key_finding: 4D slack 29-138×, adversarial max = 0.0057 (176×). K_S numerically > 0 at β=0.5.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial review of Hessian slack — found staggered mode at identity
explorations_completed.key_finding: Tight bound H_norm = 1/12 (staggered mode at Q=I). If provable: β < 1/4 threshold (12× SZZ, 6× CNS). Formula 4/(3d) not in literature.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Prove H_norm ≤ 1/12 for all Q — Fourier analysis and Lemma A
explorations_completed.key_finding: PROVED at Q=I: H_norm ≤ 1/12 (Fourier + discrete curl). PROVED for all Q: H_norm ≤ 1/8 (triangle). GAP: need ∑|B_□|² ≤ 4d|v|² for full proof. Correct formula: ⌈d/2⌉⌊d/2⌋/(N²d(d-1)).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Full 192×192 Hessian eigenvalue computation at Q=I, staggered mode verification
explorations_completed.key_finding: VERIFIED: λ_max = 4β at Q=I (SZZ convention). Staggered mode IS max eigenvector (zero residual). 5 random Q < 4β. d=5 surprise: staggered NOT max.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: 100+ config H_norm scan, temporal gauge proof attempt, SZZ convention audit
explorations_completed.key_finding: CONFIRMED: H_norm ≤ 1/12 over 100 diverse Q. Q=I unique global maximizer. Adversarial max = 0.063 << 1/12. B_P bound saturated only at Q=I. Conjecture strongly supported.
